summary: Tested WhatsApp Multi-Config API feature with dual api_type support (query_param and rest_api). All 13 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. The feature correctly supports multiple WhatsApp API configurations with different types, per-config testing, and activation switching.
seed_data_creation: Used existing WhatsApp configs: BotMasterSender (query_param, Active) and AKNexus (rest_api, Inactive)
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp Multi-Config feature fully tested. Key components verified: 1) Backend: POST/GET/PUT /api/whatsapp-config endpoints support api_type and instance_id fields. 2) Backend: PUT /api/whatsapp-config/{id}/activate switches active config. 3) Backend: POST /api/whatsapp-config/{id}/test tests specific config with body success check. 4) Backend: send_wa_msg handles both query_param (BotMasterSender) and rest_api (AKNexus) types. 5) Frontend: Settings page shows 2 configs with different type badges (REST API in blue, Query Param in slate). 6) Frontend: Enable button on inactive configs, Test button on all configs. 7) Frontend: API Type selector shows Instance ID field for REST API, HTTP Method and Advanced Field Mappings for Query Param.

Backend API Tests.GET /api/whatsapp-configs: PASS - Returns configs with api_type and instance_id fields
Backend API Tests.POST /api/whatsapp-config (rest_api): PASS - Creates config with api_type=rest_api and instance_id
Backend API Tests.Query param type send: PASS - Uses GET with query parameters
Backend API Tests.REST API type send: PASS - Uses POST with Bearer auth

Frontend UI Tests.REST API badge: PASS - AKNexus shows 'REST API' badge in blue
Frontend UI Tests.Query Param badge: PASS - Default Config shows 'Query Param' badge
Frontend UI Tests.Instance ID display: PASS - Shows 'Instance: test-instance-1' for REST API config
Frontend UI Tests.Enable button: PASS - Shows on inactive AKNexus config
Frontend UI Tests.API Type selector: PASS - Has 'Query Param API' and 'REST API' options
Frontend UI Tests.REST API form fields: PASS - Shows Instance ID field in blue box when REST API selected
Frontend UI Tests.Query Param form fields: PASS - Shows HTTP Method and Advanced Field Mappings when Query Param selected

AKNexus.status: Test token only - won't actually send messages

mocked_apis_note: AKNexus API (rest_api type) has test token only - won't actually send messages. BotMasterSender (query_param type) is real and working for text sends.
